project_type: Python multi-agent investment analysis platform with FastAPI dashboard, CLI, MCP server, 4 platform bots, backtest system
build_system: setuptools via pyproject.toml, Makefile convenience targets
test_framework: pytest with tests/ directory (test_imports.py, test_api.py, test_registry.py, test_cli.py)
verification_instructions: 1. pip install -e '.[dev]'  2. pytest tests/ -v  3. Verify all 55+ tests pass
setup_instructions: pip install -e '.[dev]' installs all dev dependencies
environment_constraints: No external network for yfinance/pip registry. Pre-installed Python 3.9. Use AST/import validation. Tests work offline since all agents use rule-based analysis without network calls.
contribution_requirements: Commit directly to main with descriptive messages like fix(loop-N): description. Update version to 6.1.0 at the end.
key_patterns: BaseAgent subclasses in src/augur/personas/*.py with analyze() method returning AgentResponse. Dashboard uses FastAPI+Jinja2. Config from config/agents.yaml. Scanner backward compat shims. CLI via click. CORS middleware conditional.
directory_structure: src/augur/ - main package; dashboard/ - FastAPI+templates app; tests/ - pytest; config/ - YAML config; personas/ - markdown persona docs; skills/ - skill markdown files; docs/ - documentation; scripts/ - utility scripts; cases/ - analysis report examples
